name: Lock. Stock. And Hungry Pumpkins.
short_description: 🎃 A fun indie western-style shooter where you must protect the townspeople from hordes of living pumpkins, find a hidden stash of gold, and uncover a farmers' conspiracy. And, of course, there’s a betrayal involved too.
detailed_description:
🎃 Are you ready for a Halloween adventure? 🎃

The Wild West. A small rundown town of Saint-Nicholas, somewhere near the Mexican border. What could possibly happen here?

Bill comes to town to visit his old friend Randall, who has retired and now works as the town sheriff. It turns out he's not the best sheriff, but he still has a nose for profitable schemes. He offers Bill a search for a stash of gold hidden in the town’s outskirts by Confederates during the Civil War.

But there's a catch — hordes of living pumpkins have attacked the town and won’t stop until they've gotten to every last one of the townsfolk. But the friends decide that this chaos might even come in handy in their adventure...

🥃 Keep a Clear Head

Whiskey can heal all the wounds of a tired cowboy — both physical and emotional. But remember, it may hurt your aim.

💥 Get Ready for Big Guns!

Were you forced to eat lots of veggies as a kid? Now’s your chance to get even!

💀 Choose Your Playstyle
Charging in guns blazing isn't always the best idea. But it sure is fun!

The full playthrough takes about 90 minutes.

But it will be crazy! 👻
